summary: Completed testing building system APIs and frontend pages. Found critical backend serialization issues preventing building and trading functionality.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization issues
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks core building functionality - users cannot build structures

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization issues
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks trade creation - users cannot create trade offers

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 404 Not Found - endpoint appears to be missing

working_endpoints.status: ✅ Returns all 5 materials with strength/durability stats
✅ Returns all 19 schematics across 4 tiers (5-6-4-4 distribution)
✅ Returns user materials and gold correctly
✅ Returns all placed buildings grouped by location
✅ Returns open trade offers with proper structure
✅ Returns contribution status and unlocked schematics

access_issues.issue: Requires authentication, redirects to login when not authenticated
Requires authentication, redirects to login when not authenticated

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test building functionality due to backend /api/build endpoint failures
Cannot test trade creation due to backend /api/trade/offer endpoint failures

testing_limitations.issue: Browser automation crashes in container environment
testing_limitations.impact: Cannot complete full UI interaction testing
testing_limitations.workaround: Manual testing or different environment needed

passed_tests: Materials API returns 5 materials (wood, stone, iron, crystal, obsidian)
Schematics API returns 19 schematics across 4 tiers
Inventory API returns user materials and gold
Trade Offers API returns open trades
Contribution API returns status and unlocks
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix MongoDB ObjectId serialization errors in /api/build and /api/trade/offer endpoints. The backend is returning ObjectIds in JSON responses which causes 500 errors. Need to either exclude _id fields from MongoDB queries or convert ObjectIds to strings. Also implement missing /api/conversations/{characterId} endpoint.

success_percentage.frontend: 0% (unable to complete due to browser/backend issues)
